evals.prompt: How do I update evals when my code changes?
evals.expected_output: The skill loads the plugin README, navigates to the 'Updating evals when code changes' section, and prints it verbatim. askQuestion is used for section selection if ambiguous.
assertions: The response contains the 'Updating evals when code changes' section
The response mentions the --check CI mode
The response mentions targeted vs rediscovery modes
No inferred or rephrased content was substituted for the README text

evals.expected_output: A numbered askQuestion listing of all available help sections. No section content is printed until the user chooses.
assertions: askQuestion was used with a numbered list of sections
The list includes at least: Overview, Quick start, Configuration, LLM backend (@cursor/sdk), Updating evals when code changes, Comparing runs, CI integration, Troubleshooting
No section body was printed until a selection was made
